    Viera - Class in races
    Represents the Viera race and its specific stat bonuses
    Viera() - Constructor for class races.Viera
    Constructs a new Viera character, initializing their specific base stats, walking speed, and racial traits.
    Viera.VieraClan - Enum Class in races
     
    Viper - Class in jobs
    Represents the Viper job and its specific choices
    Viper() - Constructor for class jobs.Viper
    Sets the name and description
